description_long: This is a pair of low-top casual sneakers with an olive green suede-like upper and contrasting reddish-pink laces. The shoes feature double-stitched detailing along the sides and a brown rubber sole with visible stitching around the edge. The heel area is reinforced with a reddish-pink patch, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. Decorative side stripes and a subtle logo on the tongue and heel add visual interest. The overall design is sporty yet suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A pair of olive green low-top sneakers with reddish-pink laces, brown rubber soles, and stitched detailing, designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, reddish-pink laces, and padded tongue of both shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the double-stitched side stripes, brown sole, and padded collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reddish-pink heel patches, subtle logo, and brown sole stitching.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side stripes, laces, and overall shoe profile.
